records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Apostatized (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Apostatizing.]

defs: To renounce totally a religious belief once professed; to forsake one's church, the faith or principles once held, or the party to which one has previously adhered.
quotes: He apostatized from his old faith in facts, took to believing in semblances.
